summary: test_force_transition_is_a_free_ungated_move (AGENT->USER via WORKING->PLAN) and test_force_transition_seeds_destination_responsibilities (USER->AGENT via PLAN->WORKING) both assert task.turn after force_transition equals the destination's turn_on_enter, and in each case the pre-move turn genuinely differs from the post-move value, so the assertion cannot pass if turn_on_enter were ignored or the turn left unchanged.
